blockingIssues.description: The requested scrutiny-validator feature is not evidenced as complete: no spawned review subagents or synthesized findings were produced in the reviewed transcript.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the required evidence for validation-role features: spawned reviewer reports and synthesized JSON output must exist before marking the feature complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review found the feature transcript did not show review subagents or a synthesized scrutiny report, even though the orchestration fix itself was addressed.
